translations.en: Goodscrafter
a quiet, listless gargoyle.
translations.zh: 沉默而了無生氣的魔像。

translations.en: "Oh, the False Prophet," the gargoyle says calmly.
"To suppose that you have come to kill me as well. All right."
"An-bal-sil-fer," the gargoyle says calmly. "Sum in-korp i. Vers."
translations.zh: 「An-bal-sil-fer，」魔像平靜地說。「Sum in-korp i. Vers.」

translations.en: The gargoyle silently awaits his fate.
translations.zh: 魔像靜默地等待命運降臨。

translations.en: "To ask why you disturb me again, False Prophet."
"To see the Amulet of Submission."
"To suppose, then, that my world has been saved."
"But to feel that salvation has come too @late."
"To refuse to discuss my @grief with the being who caused it."
translations.zh: 「吾拒絕與造成吾@grief哀慟之人談論此事。」

translations.en: "Surely to know what pain you have caused by stealing the Codex?"
translations.zh: 「汝必知竊取守則之書給吾族帶來何等痛苦？」

translations.en: "To not believe that you care. To believe, in fact, that you enjoy causing @suffering."
translations.zh: 「吾不信汝在乎。事實上，吾深信汝以造成@suffering苦難為樂。」

translations.en: "To not believe that you would do anything to help."
translations.zh: 「吾不信汝會做任何事來幫助吾族。」

translations.en: "To not have a name."
"To have nothing at all now..."
"To be a goodscrafter."
"Though to have no reason to make @goods now."
translations.zh: 「然而如今已無理由再製作@goods物品了。」

translations.en: "To invite you to take what you want."
"To have lost my entire family in the @cataclysms."
translations.zh: 「在那場@cataclysms大災變中，吾失去了所有家人。」

translations.en: "To wish not to speak of it."
"To wait here for you to return to kill me."
"To not care about $Z."
"To not care about anything now."

translator_notes: 工匠為失去全部家人的絕望魔像，對偽先知的到來完全冷漠甚至歡迎死亡。語氣虛無，截然不同於其他魔像的對抗姿態。大災變（cataclysms）造成守則之書失竊後的地震海嘯等。
